name: costguard
description: Self-hosted marketplace for the Costguard cost-audit plugin.

plugins.name: costguard
plugins.description: Find and quantify cloud and CI spend waste from your coding agent. Read-only billing checks (GitHub Actions, Supabase, Railway, Netlify, Neon), static CI/cron waste rules, dry-run-first auto-fixes for workflow files, and a monthly cost digest — via /costguard-audit, /costguard-fix, or the costguard skill.
